personal.name: Lucas Silva e Silva
personal.headline: Senior Backend Engineer – Distributed Systems & Platform Architecture

summary: Senior Backend Engineer with 8+ years of experience designing and building distributed systems and backend applications. Proficient in Python, Kafka, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, and AWS. Passionate about clean architecture, event-driven systems, and mentoring junior engineers. Proven track record of delivering scalable real-time data pipelines serving millions of users.

experience.role_summary: Platform team — internal developer platform serving 200+ engineers
highlights: Led the migration of a monolithic application to a Kubernetes-based microservices architecture, reducing deployment time by 80% and significantly improving system resilience.

Architected a high-throughput event-driven data pipeline processing 10M+ events per day, leveraging Kafka for event streaming and PostgreSQL for durable storage, enabling scalable and responsive data processing.
Mentored 4 junior engineers through structured pair programming and code review practices
Reduced system latency by 40% through query optimization and caching strategy implementation

achievements.action: Built RESTful API serving 50K+ daily active users
achievements.result: enabling real-time data access for the entire customer base
achievements.summary: Built a RESTful API serving 50K+ daily active users with 99.9% uptime over 2 years, enabling real-time data access for the entire customer base.

achievements.action: Implemented CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
achievements.result: reducing release cycle from 2 weeks to daily deployments
achievements.summary: Implemented CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions, reducing release cycle from 2 weeks to daily deployments.

achievements.action: Developed real-time notification system using WebSockets
achievements.summary: Developed real-time notification system using WebSockets, improving user engagement by 25%.

highlights: Created automated testing suite achieving 90% code coverage across all client projects
Collaborated in agile team of 6 developers, delivering projects on time and within budget

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.name: FastAPI Admin
projects.description: Open-source contributor to FastAPI Admin – an admin panel integration library for FastAPI applications, featuring role-based access control and automatic CRUD generation. Designed RBAC system with fine-grained permissions and reduced boilerplate by 60%.
highlights: Designed RBAC system supporting fine-grained permission assignment across 10+ resource types
Reduced boilerplate by 60% compared to manual admin panel implementation
